2021-22 San Diego State Aztecs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 23-9 (13-4, 3rd in MWC MBB)

Coach: Brian Dutcher

PS/G: 65.4 (311th of 358)

PA/G: 58.1 (2nd of 358)

SRS: 13.13 (36th of 358)

SOS: 5.85 (80th of 358)

ORtg: 99.0 (263rd of 358)

DRtg: 88.0 (1st of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +8000

NCAA Tournament: (#8 seed in Midwest)
Lost Midwest First Round (72-69) versus #9 Creighton
